doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future), uses non-existent reference formats, and contradicts established GDPR principles that pseudonymized data remains personal data regardless of key possession.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from current perspective), references a non-existent EDPB guidance number series format, and contains a legal position fundamentally inconsistent with established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
response_turn2:
